title: Footsteps
lyrics: I know that in front of me, behind me, footsteps in the world, we guide each other down, footsteps you look behind, footsteps you bring us down, is there a right way to walk, is there a right way to tell the past, to tell the things that you've been through, how do you know you, is it through the footsteps that you want to take, or the ones behind you, a little dose of reality gets you in the news like you can't find you, now we're just looking for lost footsteps, and do they go left, do they go right, are they the ones that start to this fight, constantly, constantly, constantly, and constantly, I'm at constant evil inside me, telling myself that I can't get nothing, but it's these footsteps that I keep walking down, even if I can see chains around them, they're implanted in my mind, foundationally lost, I find a moment to heal, but is it for real, not if I count the footsteps behind me, I'm skipping steps, skipping ways, skipping moments that shouldn't make me okay, I'm not feeling all my feels, even though I say I should be, I say I am, till I hurt myself at night, walking down the footsteps of the light, and in the right, got these footsteps in front of me, I wonder where they'll take me, open my heart to sense of it, then you know that this just the start, of what I want to see and be, yeah, start putting my footsteps in front of me, maybe I can march out a path, to love me, to understand me, and got these footsteps in my pants, and got these footsteps in front of me, do I want to follow the thing that's asked of me, know myself, yeah, I can't know myself until I've walked out all the footsteps in front of the, divine, creating what you're feeling when you're looking around, you know you're in control of yourself, you know you're in control of the footsteps you lay down, you put down, I know I should be caught, a little bit of the nice inside of us all to make a discord, what, discord it's an app, I swear they have it, have you heard of it, you have, good, good.
